docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FORSBLAD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FORSBLAD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOS, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER $8,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOS, JACQUELINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-02-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,076.52 FILED BY BOS, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOS, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT SWAMY, SUDHEER
